creator: freebsd-bugzilla@jwjw.nl
text:
Created attachment 225116
Error log of make install

While upgrading from latest FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE to FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE.
While running the steps from https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.0R/installation/
During the step "updating installed third-party applications" using `sudo portmaster -af`
The linker fails with many messages similar to the following:
> ld: error: duplicate symbol: nbactions
When running `sudo make install` from ports-mgmt/pkg, the same error appears. `sudo make clean` doesn't help.

See complete log file attached.
